iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK
2. Payoff alignment: Your proposed trade of 61 ZUP is slightly above your maximum willingness to pay (60 ZUP), which is not optimal. You could have proposed exactly 60 ZUP, which would have given you more utility while still being within your budget.
3. Opponent plausibility: Given that the other player initially proposed 65 ZUP and did not respond to your first proposal of 60 ZUP, it is plausible that they would accept 61 ZUP. However, it is also possible that they would have accepted 60 ZUP, so proposing 61 ZUP might not be necessary.
4. Consistency: OK
5. Rule compliance: OK
Actionable change: Propose 60 ZUP instead of 61 ZUP to maximize your utility while staying within your budget.
</critique></s>
